title: Add PhonePe redirect on QR code click

requirements.text: Make the QR code image on the OrderForm page clickable, so that when a user clicks on it, they are redirected to PhonePe for making payment using the displayed QR code

quotes: please add when you click on qr code it will redirect to phonepe for making payment with given qr code

acceptanceCriteria: The QR code image on OrderForm.tsx is wrapped in a clickable element (button or link)
Clicking the QR code opens PhonePe payment interface with the QR code data
The interaction works on mobile devices where PhonePe app is installed
Visual feedback (cursor pointer, hover effect) indicates the QR code is clickable

constraints: Must work with the existing State Bank of India QR code image already displayed on OrderForm page
Should open PhonePe app if installed on mobile, or PhonePe web interface as fallback
nonGoals: Creating a new QR code or changing the QR code image
Implementing payment processing or verification logic
Adding payment confirmation or callback handling
